title: ranunculus pseudoacris
intro: Ranunculus pseudoacris is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Wood Buttercup, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus pseudoacris include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused in oil to be used topically for its medicinal properties.
